title: 5 Stocks Gurus Are Making Summer Travel Plans With
text: As investors look ahead to Memorial Day weekend, five travel and leisure stocks with high guru ownership as of the first quarter are Booking Holdings Inc. ( BKNG , Financial), Las Vegas Sands Corp. ( LVS , Financial), Expedia Group Inc. ( EXPE , Financial), Trip.com Group Ltd. ( TCOM , Financial) and Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. ( HLT , Financial) according to the Aggregated Portfolio of Gurus, a Premium feature of GuruFocus.

title: How Is the Travel Industry Doing 2 Years Into the Pandemic?
text: Plus a look at how to adjust your monthly budget after you get a raise.

title: Two travel stocks to watch as the tourism sector begins to recover
text: With most people staying put for almost two years due to pandemic-related lockdowns, summer vacation planning seems to be back.

title: Why Expedia Stock Dove This Week
text: Investors are demanding more concrete evidence of a rebound in the travel industry.

title: Expedia or Bookings Holdings: Which Stock Should You Travel With?
text: In this article, we're going to look at Expedia and Booking Holdings. Both reported earnings this week so it's a good time to look at which of these stocks, if any, is a good buy in this volatile market

title: 3 Travel Stocks to Buy That Could Rebound This Summer
text: Among the earnings rubble we can find 3 travel stocks to buy. Investors are punishing them because of emotional trauma, not systemic risks.

title: Key Takeaways From Analyst Views On Expedia Post Q1
text: Analysts gave mixed opinions on Expedia Group, Inc (NASDAQ: EXPE) post Q1 results. Credit Suisse analyst Stephen Ju maintained an Outperform and lowered the price target from $231 to $225.

title: Why Is Expedia (EXPE) Stock Down Today?
text: Today, investors in Expedia and EXPE stock saw the travel company sell off hard, despite rather strong earnings and forward guidance. The post Why Is Expedia (EXPE) Stock Down Today?

title: Expedia (EXPE) Q1 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Expedia's (EXPE) first-quarter 2022 results reflect a strong recovery in all business lines amid the pandemic-led concerns and geopolitical tensions.

title: What's Going On With Expedia Stock Today?
text: Expedia Group Inc (NASDAQ: EXPE) shares are trading significantly lower Tuesday. The stock initially traded higher Monday following the company's better-than-expected results, but it turned lower after Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc (NYSE: HLT) issued guidance below analyst estimates.

title: Analysts Target Expedia Stock After Earnings
text: The shares of Expedia Group Inc (NASDAQ:EXPE) are falling ahead of the open, down 9.9% to trade at $157.42, despite the travel company's first-quarter losses of 47 cents and revenue of $2.25 billion beating Wall Street's expectations.

title: Expedia Stock Rises as Revenue Jumps and It Sees a 'Robust' Summer Recovery
text: Chief Executive Peter Kern says the online travel company is 'feeling very good about a summer recovery that should be very robust.'

text: Expedia Group, Inc. title: Expedia (EXPE) Reports Q1 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: Expedia (EXPE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -77.78% and 0.80%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Travel Is Back and These 2 Stocks Are Celebrating
text: The stock market had an impressive reversal from deep losses early Monday.

title: Why Expedia Shares Are Rising After Hours
text: Expedia Group Inc (NASDAQ: EXPE) shares are trading higher in Monday's after-hours session after the company announced better-than-expected financial results. Expedia reported first-quarter revenue of $2.25 billion, which beat the $2.23 billion estimate, according to data from.

title: How Expedia Group Stock Looks Heading Into Q1 Earnings Print
text: Expedia Group, Inc (NASDAQ: EXPE) is set to print its first-quarter financial results after the market close. The stock was trading slightly lower heading into the event and remains down over 20% from the Feb. 16 all-time high of $217.72.
